# TTL640x480 integration note

Upstream:

- https://github.com/mengstr/TTL640x480

Current upstream README describes the design as a low chip count TTL VGA timing
generator for 640x480 sync/blanking. It lists:

- 3 x 74HCT393 dual 4-bit counters
- 2 x 74HCT00 quad 2-input NAND
- 1 x 74HCT10 triple 3-input NAND
- 2 x 74HCT20 dual 4-input NAND
- 1 x 74HCT04 hex inverter
- 3 x 1N4148 diodes
- 1 x 2K2 resistor
- 1 x 25.175 MHz clock generator

Integration rule for this repo:

- Do not vendor the upstream design silently.
- Either add it as a documented external source/submodule later, or redraw the
  needed block in KiCad with provenance and license notes.
- Keep the first simulation interface abstract: `hsync`, `vsync`, `blank`, and
  pixel enable are enough until the memory/video bridge is stable.
